LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Stonecutter.title: Stonecutter
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Stonecutter.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] is involved in creating whimsical stone statues, as well as carving stone bricks.
[PAWN_nameDef] works as an interior designer and models 3D objects in an urbanized world.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Producer.title: Producer
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Producer.descript: [PAWN_nameDef] works as a director in a world torn apart by war, where you have to really try to surprise the audience.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Bionics_Doctor.de: [PAWN_nameDef] has been working as an ordinary surgeon for a long time, but {PAWN_gender ? his : her} talent is noticed by high-ranking people. [PAWN_nameDef] receives a license to operate bionic.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Cosmonaut.title: Cosmonaut
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Cosmonaut.descrip: Since childhood, [PAWN_nameDef] dreamed of becoming a cosmonaut, like many other children of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} world. Ultimately, [PAWN_nameDef]'s stubbornness helps {PAWN_gender ? him : her} achieve {PAWN_gender ? his : her} goal.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Cynologist.title: Cynologist
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Cynologist.descri: [PAWN_nameDef] loves working with dogs, so [PAWN_nameDef] gladly got a job as a dog handler in the police department.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Biochemist.title: Biochemist
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Biochemist.descri: [PAWN_nameDef] understands chemistry very well, which helped {PAWN_gender ? him : her} get a prestigious job. [PAWN_nameDef] studies the biosphere of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} planet all day long.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Inquiry_Agent.des: [PAWN_nameDef] has been working as a private detective for a long time in an industrial world full of corruption. Ultimately, [PAWN_nameDef] realizes that this is a profitable business.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Fighter_Pilot.des: [PAWN_nameDef] is fascinated by the sky and literally raves about it. In adulthood, [PAWN_nameDef] enlists in the army to serve as a fighter pilot.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Bomber_Pilot.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] is fascinated by the sky and literally raves about it. In adulthood, [PAWN_nameDef] enlists in the army to serve as a bomber pilot.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Military_Journali: [PAWN_nameDef] is often under fire, but tirelessly continues {PAWN_gender ? his : her} work.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Chemist_Technolog: [PAWN_nameDef] is involved in the testing of chemicals and the design of various devices.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Investigator.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] has been working for a long time as an investigator for particularly important cases in the police department of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} city.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Psychiatrist.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] works with people with serious mental illness.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Military_Psycholo: [PAWN_nameDef] has been working in the rear headquarters for a long time, treating and rehabilitating soldiers.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Military_Psychiat: [PAWN_nameDef] works with shell-shocked soldiers, helping them rehabilitate behind the front lines.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Illustrator.title: Illustrator
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Illustrator.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] draws illustrations for children's books for an elderly writer.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Programmer_Develo: For many years [PAWN_nameDef] has been developing software for a large gaming company.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Landscape_Designe: [PAWN_nameDef] is passionate about landscape design, working part-time on furnishing country houses for wealthy people.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Web_Designer.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] practices design for websites of various companies. In the end, {PAWN_gender ? his : her} talent is revealed in all its glory.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Movie_Artist.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] acts in films, often making {PAWN_gender ? his : her} way to movie posters in {PAWN_gender ? his : her} industrialized world.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Interior_Designer: [PAWN_nameDef] designs furniture sets and home furnishings, earning big bucks.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Pathologist.title: Pathologist
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Pathologist.descr: Throughout [PAWN_nameDef]'s medical practice, [PAWN_nameDef] has performed multiple autopsies and analyzes for examinations.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Resuscitator.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] is the doctor who makes the dead come to life. Many see {PAWN_gender ? his : her} profession as a real miracle.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Archaeologist.des: [PAWN_nameDef] is passionate about ancient history and connected {PAWN_gender ? his : her} profession with it. [PAWN_nameDef] is engaged in the excavation of ancient civilizations and cities.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Sound_Engineer.de: [PAWN_nameDef] is engaged in sound tuning for filming movies or feature films.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Geneticist.title: Geneticist
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Geneticist.descri: [PAWN_nameDef]He lives in an underground complex, classified by the government. There [PAWN_nameDef] and {PAWN_gender ? his : her} colleagues conduct experiments on humans and animals, studying genetics and conducting tests.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Radio_Host.title: Radio host
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Radio_Host.descri: [PAWN_nameDef] broadcasts radio broadcasts to the war-ravaged population on behalf of the government.
[PAWN_nameDef] teaches the mother tongue to children at school.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Physics_Teacher.d: [PAWN_nameDef] teaches the physics to children at school.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Chemistry_Teacher: [PAWN_nameDef] teaches the chemistry to children at school.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Mathematic_Teache: [PAWN_nameDef] teaches the mathematic to children at school.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Drawing_Teacher.d: [PAWN_nameDef] teaches the drawing to children at school.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Music_Teacher.des: [PAWN_nameDef] teaches the music to children at school.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Undertaker.title: Undertaker
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Undertaker.descri: [PAWN_nameDef] runs the funeral business, negotiating funeral procedures.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Forensic_Expert.d: [PAWN_nameDef] monitors the veracity of the testimony of witnesses at trial, and also checks the evidence provided.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Judge.title: Judge
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Judge.description: [PAWN_nameDef] renders verdicts against the accused at trial, relying on the norms of the law of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} world.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Confectioner.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] loves to cook various sweets, making a business out of it.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Aero_Engineer.des: [PAWN_nameDef] designs and builds air transport for {PAWN_gender ? his : her} faction.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Reconstructor.des: [PAWN_nameDef] loves everything related to history and is engaged in the reconstruction of life and battles of the past.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_General.title: General
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_General.descripti: [PAWN_nameDef] sits high in the army hierarchy, regularly developing military operations.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Captain.title: Captain
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Captain.descripti: [PAWN_nameDef] leads a warship, often taking part in military maneuvers and battles at sea.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Admiral.title: Admiral
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Admiral.descripti: [PAWN_nameDef] leads a battle squadron, leading battles in the seas and oceans.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_War_Hero.title: War hero
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_War_Hero.descript: [PAWN_nameDef] became a hero of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} faction, single-handedly deciding the outcome of a military battle.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_War_Criminal.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] has escaped prison many times, organizing terrorist attacks and military attacks in the name of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} religion.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Road_Paver.title: Road paver
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Road_Paver.descri: [PAWN_nameDef] works by building roads linking many settlements.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Terrorist.title: Terrorist
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Terrorist.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] lost himself long ago, dissolving {PAWN_gender ? his : her} personality in pools of blood of innocent people.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Rebel.title: Rebel
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Rebel.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has been fighting the government of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} state for as long as {PAWN_gender ? he : she} can remember.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Anarchist.title: Anarchist
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Anarchist.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] is waging a guerrilla war against the government as part of a small anarchist group.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Photographer.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] usually has a low income, working as a photographer at children's parties and weddings.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Assassin.title: Assassin
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Assassin.descript: [PAWN_nameDef] works as a hitman in the medieval world, earning a reputation as a bloody man.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Rescuer.title: Rescuer
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Rescuer.descripti: [PAWN_nameDef] works in the rescue service, pulling people out of the rubble and avalanches.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Time_Traveler.des: [PAWN_nameDef] is developing a time machine, but something goes wrong. [PAWN_nameDef] could not start it.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Lonely_Artist.des: [PAWN_nameDef] spent all {PAWN_gender ? his : her} life alone, expressing {PAWN_gender ? his : her} pain in paintings.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Escaped_Slave.des: [PAWN_nameDef] spent all {PAWN_gender ? his : her} life alone, expressing {PAWN_gender ? his : her} pain in paintings.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Artilleryman.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] served in the industrial army, firing artillery.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Gun_Layer.title: Gun-layer
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Gun_Layer.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] adjusted artillery fire during a heavy trench war.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Astronomer.title: Astronomer
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Astronomer.descri: [PAWN_nameDef] studies stars and planets, and also reveals the relationships in their movement.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Botanist.title: Botanist
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Botanist.descript: [PAWN_nameDef] is a certified botanist and is involved in plant breeding.
[PAWN_nameDef] designs microscopic robots for a variety of tasks.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Urban_Planner.des: [PAWN_nameDef] designs the construction of communications in new areas of the city.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Diplomat.title: Diplomat
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Diplomat.descript: [PAWN_nameDef] is in charge of matters of peace and war on behalf of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} ruler.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Consul.title: Consul
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Consul.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] was the head of the diplomatic department, which pursued policy on behalf of the state.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Ecologist.title: Ecologist
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Ecologist.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] worked to protect the ecology of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} planet from growing industrial pollution.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Lawyer.title: Lawyer
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Lawyer.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] specialized in the legal defense of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} clients in court.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Forwarder.title: Forwarder
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Forwarder.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] often went on grueling hikes, visiting previously unknown places on the planet.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Immunologist.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] studies and treats diseases of the immune system in a private clinic in an urbanized world.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Bionic.title: Bionic
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Bionic.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] designs blueprints for bionic prostheses while working for a government clinic.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Film_Critic.title: Film critic
Critic
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Film_Critic.descr: [PAWN_nameDef]'s job was to analyze movies and criticize them.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_DJ.title: DJ
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_DJ.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has been making music for a long time and eventually becomes a club DJ.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Guide.title: Guide
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Guide.description: [PAWN_nameDef] leads excursions and provides entertainment for numerous foreigners.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Agrochemist.title: Agrochemist
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Agrochemist.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] is engaged in biology and the development of new varieties of plants, through selection.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Taster.title: Taster
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Taster.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] tastes food and products before serving them to guests.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Sports_Doctor.des: [PAWN_nameDef] has a medical degree and is involved in the rehabilitation of athletes in the industrialized world.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Meteorologist.des: [PAWN_nameDef] studies meteorites and rocks from other planets.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Linguist.title: Linguist
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Linguist.descript: [PAWN_nameDef] studies many languages ​​and speaks them fluently.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Analyst.title: Analyst
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Analyst.descripti: [PAWN_nameDef] does mathematics and mathematical analysis, making graphs and making predictions for various things.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Orthodontist.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] works as a dentist in a clinic in an urbanized world for most of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} life.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Advisor.title: Advisor
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Advisor.descripti: [PAWN_nameDef] is the political advisor to the puppet leader.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Mechanic.title: Mechanic
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Mechanic.descript: [PAWN_nameDef] is a mechanic in a factory, repairing vehicles.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Pharmacist.title: Pharmacist
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Pharmacist.descri: [PAWN_nameDef] worked for a long time in a pharmacy, and then at a drug manufacturing plant.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Cultist.title: Cultist
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Cultist.descripti: [PAWN_nameDef] is a priest of a cult-like cult.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Sectarian.title: Sectarian
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Sectarian.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] falls into a brutal paramilitary sect, losing {PAWN_gender ? his : her} identity.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Conspirator.title: Conspirator
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Conspirator.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] has experienced many power changes, weaving political intrigues.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Electronic.title: Electronic
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Electronic.descri: [PAWN_nameDef] creates electrical devices and microcircuits while working in a huge industrial plant.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Oilman.title: Oilman
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Oilman.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] is in charge of the oil production at the enterprise.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Economist.title: Economist
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Economist.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] examines the economy of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} state, drawing up schedules and plans.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Dispatcher.title: Dispatcher
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Dispatcher.descri: [PAWN_nameDef] deals with the regulation of air traffic.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Banker.title: Banker
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Banker.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] is in charge of the circulation of money in {PAWN_gender ? his : her} branch of the bank and is engaged in counting deposits.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Optician.title: Optician
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Optician.descript: [PAWN_nameDef] develops optical lenses for binoculars and spotting scopes.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Archivist.title: Archivist
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Archivist.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] is in charge of the library fund of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} academy, studying and recounting it.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Antique_Dealer.de: [PAWN_nameDef] collects rare items, selling entire collections.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Drug_Dealer.title: Drug dealer
Dealer
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Drug_Dealer.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] is involved in the criminal business as a drug dealer.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Regent.title: Regent
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Regent.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] became regent with {PAWN_gender ? his : her} young son, but killed {PAWN_gender ? him : her} to seize power.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Emperor.title: Emperor
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Emperor.descripti: [PAWN_nameDef] led a small empire scattered around the world, becoming a very formidable ruler.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_King_Puppet.title: King puppet
King
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_King_Puppet.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] had a weak character, becoming the de facto puppet of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} regent.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Privy_Counselor.d: [PAWN_nameDef] was a henchman of a foreign state, implicitly managing state affairs.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Commissioner.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] is responsible for maintaining discipline in the ranks of the army.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Autocrat.title: Autocrat
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Autocrat.descript: [PAWN_nameDef] is a cruel king, having reached the top of power over the heads of thousands of people.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Court_Gardener.de: [PAWN_nameDef] worked for a long time as a gardener in the elite palace of the royal family.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Court_Designer.de: [PAWN_nameDef] designed luxury interiors at the royal castle.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Court_Confectione: [PAWN_nameDef] makes cakes and other pastries of incredible beauty.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Court_Guard.title: Court guard
Guard
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Court_Guard.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] guards the Emperor's chambers at the cost of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} own life.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Court_Doctor.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] has a good medical background, working at the royal court.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Butler.title: Butler
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Butler.descriptio: For most of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} life, [PAWN_nameDef] works at the court of titled persons, having earned himself an impeccable reputation.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Combat_Officer.de: [PAWN_nameDef] served during a terrible trench war that destroyed {PAWN_gender ? his : her} home, country and life.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Machine_Gunner.de: [PAWN_nameDef] went through several local conflicts, invariably defending {PAWN_gender ? his : her} positions with a machine gun.
In adulthood, [PAWN_nameDef] found the beginning of the war, enrolling in a detachment of mountain riflemen defending the passes.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Tank_Commander.de: [PAWN_nameDef] led a tank brigade during the war.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Winter_Sniper.des: [PAWN_nameDef] was the deadliest sniper during the Winter War.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Infantry_Commande: [PAWN_nameDef] led a small detachment of infantry, conducting sabotage in the rear of the enemy faction.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Driller.title: Driller
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Driller.descripti: [PAWN_nameDef] is engaged in well drilling for energy and ore exploration.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Geodesist.title: Geodesist
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Geodesist.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] studies surface and altitude for strategic purposes.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Molder.title: Molder
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Molder.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] is engaged in casting molds for weapons and furniture.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Metallurgist.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] researches metal alloys, creating new mixtures for a wide variety of purposes.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Metrologist.title: Metrologist
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Metrologist.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] develops methods for measuring various physical quantities based on various instruments.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Installer.title: Installer
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Installer.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] is engaged in the installation and assembly of mechanical structures.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Service_Technicia: [PAWN_nameDef] maintains the equipment in working order and performs regular technical inspections.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Welder.title: Welder
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Welder.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] is a specialist in welding steel structures.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Locksmith.title: Locksmith
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Locksmith.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] repairs complex mechanical and electrical equipment during breakdowns.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Woodworker.title: Woodworker
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Woodworker.descri: [PAWN_nameDef] makes objects from wood, sometimes amazing others with {PAWN_gender ? his : her} skill.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Thermist.title: Thermist
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Thermist.descript: [PAWN_nameDef] is engaged in the development of cooling and space heating systems.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Technician.title: Technician
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Technician.descri: [PAWN_nameDef] is the chief engineer of large-scale production.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Turner.title: Turner
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Turner.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] works at the machine and makes metal and wood parts for construction.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Machiner.title: Machiner
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Machiner.descript: [PAWN_nameDef] creates gears and other parts for complex mechanisms on a machine tool.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Electrician.title: Electrician
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Electrician.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] fixes electrical grids in the weapons industry.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Watchmaker.title: Watchmaker
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Watchmaker.descri: [PAWN_nameDef] tunes mechanical watches and other small movements to order.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Rocketman.title: Rocketman
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Rocketman.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] controls the artillery combat system that protects the heavenly space.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Rock_Performer.de: [PAWN_nameDef] performs music as part of a musical group.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Wandering_Musicia: After the tragic death of the band members, [PAWN_nameDef] is left all alone.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Homeless.title: Homeless
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Homeless.descript: [PAWN_nameDef] has been on the street for so long that it seems {PAWN_gender ? he : she} never had a home.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Giant_Thought.des: The thoughts of [PAWN_nameDef] are so ingenious that words cannot describe it.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Gamer.title: Gamer
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Gamer.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has been playing games for most of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} life, immersed in another world.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Steamer.title: Steamer
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Steamer.descripti: [PAWN_nameDef] lives off donations from {PAWN_gender ? his : her} subscribers, not imagining himself without it.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Lazy_Student.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] enters a prestigious university, but prefers to party.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Medical_Student.d: [PAWN_nameDef] studies anatomy and dreams of healing people.
[PAWN_nameDef] is studying the mechanics of war machines, hoping to build {PAWN_gender ? his : her} own artificial intelligence system.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Student_Teacher.d: [PAWN_nameDef] loves working with children, so {PAWN_gender ? he : she} decides to enroll in teacher training college.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Student.title: Student
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Student.descripti: [PAWN_nameDef] studied at a higher academy, gaining extensive knowledge in the humanities.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Science_Writer.de: [PAWN_nameDef] is very fond of science fiction, deciding to write {PAWN_gender ? his : her} own story, which did not resonate with the publisher.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Novelist.title: Novelist
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Novelist.descript: [PAWN_nameDef] has extensive experience writing romance novels that regularly hit the top sellers.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Despot.title: Despot
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Despot.descriptio: Once [PAWN_nameDef] managed to seize power in a faction through a conspiracy. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} very tightly holds on to power, using all methods for this.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Revolutionary.des: Inspired by the ideas of the revolution, [PAWN_nameDef] participates in an illegal coup.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Invader.title: Invader
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Invader.descripti: [PAWN_nameDef] was part of the assault army, whose tasks included war in the city.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Occupant.title: Occupant
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Occupant.descript: [PAWN_nameDef] was garrisoned in the captured city, clearing out saboteurs and resistance units.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Revanchist.title: Revanchist
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Revanchist.descri: The [PAWN_nameDef] faction was crushed by the superior forces of the enemy, but [PAWN_nameDef] does not surrender and has been fighting a guerrilla war for many years.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Border_Guard.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] serves at the border outpost, guarding faction territory from saboteur groups.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Outpost_Officer.d: [PAWN_nameDef] serves at the border post as part of the officer corps, commanding security teams.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Resistance_Leader: [PAWN_nameDef] is the leader of a banned faction that is trying to overthrow the tyrant from the throne of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} faction.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Cashier.title: Cashier
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Cashier.descripti: [PAWN_nameDef] serves customers in the grocery chain of the urbanized world.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Secretary.title: Secretary
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Secretary.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] is responsible for reviewing and filtering complaints and documents before sending them to management.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Clergyman.title: Clergyman
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Clergyman.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] was the spiritual leader of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} village during the years of isolation.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Monk.title: Monk
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Monk.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has lived {PAWN_gender ? his : her} life in an isolated fortress serving a religious cult.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Battle_Monk.title: Battle monk
Monk
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Battle_Monk.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] has lived all {PAWN_gender ? his : her} life in the fortress, having managed to take part in its defense.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Paratrooper.title: Paratrooper
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Paratrooper.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] was in the amphibious assault group for landing from orbit.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Historian.title: Historian
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Historian.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] explores the rich history of the human race and its intricate experiences.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Fortress_Commanda: [PAWN_nameDef] oversees the defense of the fortress and instructs the militia.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Serf.title: Serf
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Serf.description: [PAWN_nameDef] работает на своего хозяина, является лично обязанным.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Boyarin.title: Boyarin
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Boyarin.descripti: [PAWN_nameDef] is of noble origin, using its privileges.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Remote_Identity.d: [PAWN_nameDef] doesn't remember anything about {PAWN_gender ? his : her} past. In fact, only a shell remained of him.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Exiled_Leader.des: [PAWN_nameDef] The head of an exiled government with no real political power.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Exiled_Soldier.de: [PAWN_nameDef] A member of the exiled volunteer army hoping to restore legitimate authority.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Bomber.title: Bomber
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Bomber.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] is a dangerous criminal and a failed suicide bomber. During the terrorist attack, {PAWN_gender ? his : her} explosive device did not work.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Deserter.title: Deserter
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Deserter.descript: [PAWN_nameDef] surrenders to a hostile military group and gives them strategic intelligence.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Shadow_Agent.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] An undercover rebel agent who collects information and transmits it to the underground.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Secret_Gendarme.d: [PAWN_nameDef] a seemingly unremarkable citizen who, however, is engaged in the search and neutralization of saboteurs.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Spaceship_Enginee: [PAWN_nameDef] Builds and designs spaceships for multiple crew members.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Bloody_Executione: [PAWN_nameDef] is an executioner in a medieval world that has lost its last moral foundations.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Peacemaker.title: Peacemaker
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Peacemaker.descri: [PAWN_nameDef] Soldier in the Interfactional Army Peacekeeping Corps. The balance between them collapses, and their army remains on its own.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Coordinator.title: Coordinator
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Agitator.title: Agitator
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Agitator.descript: [PAWN_nameDef] secretly distributes leaflets and slogans of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} political group to overthrow the regime.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Theorist.title: Theorist
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Theorist.descript: [PAWN_nameDef] explores quantum physics and builds models of the universe.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Marauder.title: Marauder
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Marauder.descript: He trades in robbery and robbery. One day [PAWN_nameDef] is caught by a counterintelligence agent.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Fanatic.title: Fanatic
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Fanatic.descripti: [PAWN_nameDef] is fanatically loyal to {PAWN_gender ? his : her} spiritual leader through acts of retaliation and intimidation.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Nuclear_Scientist: [PAWN_nameDef] researches radioactive decay of atoms and designs nuclear power plants.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Victim.title: Victim
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Victim.descriptio: In {PAWN_gender ? his : her} youth, [PAWN_nameDef] becomes the victim of a terrorist attack, which forever changed {PAWN_gender ? his : her} psyche.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Political_Prisone: [PAWN_nameDef] was held in harsh camps for political prisoners for a long time, having developed immunity to moral turmoil and acquired survival skills.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Navigator.title: Navigator
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Navigator.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] - the captain of a spaceship whose mission was to explore the nearest space.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Minister.title: Minister
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Minister.descript: [PAWN_nameDef] has held a high political office, successfully doing {PAWN_gender ? his : her} job.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Stormtrooper.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] A member of the Assault Team of the Battle Force. Long years in the ranks have left their mark on the psyche.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Test_Pilot.title: Test pilot
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Test_Pilot.descri: [PAWN_nameDef] tested new flight and aeronautical facilities until one day it crashed on unknown land.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Kamikaze.title: Kamikaze
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Kamikaze.descript: [PAWN_nameDef] desperate suicide pilot who was tasked with eliminating the enemy by air ramming. In fulfilling {PAWN_gender ? his : her} duty, {PAWN_gender ? he : she} miraculously remains alive.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Plate_Warrior.des: [PAWN_nameDef] a soldier of the medieval army, dressed in sturdy full-body armor.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Rebel_Leader.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] The leader of an anarchist group that aims to eliminate the rightful leader of the faction.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Chairman.title: Chairman
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Chairman.descript: [PAWN_nameDef] is in charge of a projectile industrial facility. Years in the profession led to the fact that {PAWN_gender ? he : she} studies the basics of military affairs.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Serial_Killer.des: [PAWN_nameDef] A ruthless psychopath who murdered {PAWN_gender ? his : her} family in cold blood.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Maniac.title: Maniac
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Maniac.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] is a serial killer with an unpredictable disposition and thoughts.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Destroyer_Planets: [PAWN_nameDef] becomes a spaceship pilot carrying dangerous weapons capable of destroying an entire planet. Once {PAWN_gender ? he : she} applies it on the orders of the commander.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Editor.title: Editor
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Editor.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] edits and censors scientific journal articles.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Dancer.title: Dancer
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Dancer.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] has dedicated {PAWN_gender ? his : her} life to dance and theater.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Notary.title: Notary
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Notary.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] authenticated documents in a small office in an urbanized world.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Publisher.title: Publisher
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Publisher.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] publishes magazines and newspapers with a small print shop.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_School_Doctor.des: [PAWN_nameDef] works in a school in the industrialized world, however, {PAWN_gender ? he : she} is usually difficult to find in {PAWN_gender ? his : her} workplace.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Captive_Soldier.d: [PAWN_nameDef] was captured early in the war after being in a POW camp for several years.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Captive_Doctor.de: [PAWN_nameDef] was captured early in the war after being in a POW camp for several years working as a POW medic.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Volunteer.title: Volunteer
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Volunteer.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] went to the front as a volunteer motivated by moral imperative.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Combat_Chef.title: Combat chef
Chef
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Combat_Chef.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] prepares food for the mobile army at the front.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Combat_Doctor.des: [PAWN_nameDef] provides first aid to soldiers on the battlefield.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Zoologist.title: Zoologist
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Guitar_Player.des: [PAWN_nameDef] plays guitar with a traveling music group.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Field_Sapper.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] Expert in building crossings and bridges for a marching army.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Minesweeper_Engin: [PAWN_nameDef] disables mines and minefields for the army to pass.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Art_Critic.title: Art critic
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Art_Critic.descri: [PAWN_nameDef] is well versed in art, criticizing and researching.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Underground_Leade: [PAWN_nameDef] leader of an underground terrorist organization.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Scientist_Traitor: [PAWN_nameDef] fled to the enemy, taking with {PAWN_gender ? him : her} the secret development blueprints.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Debtor.title: Debtor
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Debtor.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] has been working for a creditor most of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} life, repaying an exorbitant debt.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Exorcist.title: Exorcist
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Exorcist.descript: [PAWN_nameDef] performs rituals of cleansing and banishing evil spirits in the medieval world.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Professor.title: Professor
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Professor.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] has a broad knowledge of technical sciences while teaching at the university.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_University_Rector: [PAWN_nameDef] manages the university's operations, finances and curriculum.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Impostor.title: Impostor
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Impostor.descript: [PAWN_nameDef] described himself as a miraculously escaped monarch in an attempt to seize power.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Ship_Pilot.title: Ship pilot
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Ship_Pilot.descri: [PAWN_nameDef] knows how to fly small spaceships.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Charlatan.title: Charlatan
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Charlatan.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] cheats money from people using dirty methods.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Jester.title: Jester
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Jester.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] a clown in the medieval world, living at the court of the monarch.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Heretic.title: Heretic
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Heretic.descripti: [PAWN_nameDef] renounced the official religious faith, condemning himself to persecution.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Preacher.title: Preacher
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Preacher.descript: [PAWN_nameDef] distributed forbidden religious literature under persecution.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Influence_Agent.d: [PAWN_nameDef] was a privy councilor, effectively controlling the puppet king with the knowledge of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} faction.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Pimp.title: Pimp
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Pimp.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has several slaves selling their sexual favors.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Jailer.title: Jailer
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Jailer.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] works in the underground prison complex, keeping an eye on prisoners.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Plumber.title: Plumber
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Plumber.descripti: [PAWN_nameDef] repairs water supply and sanitation systems.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Military_Academic: [PAWN_nameDef] designs military blueprints for the military academy researchers.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Primitiver.title: Primitiver
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Chastener.title: Chastener
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Chastener.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] is engaged in the most brutal cleansing of the occupied cities from the rebels.
[PAWN_nameDef] creates chemical weapons for global warfare.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Loner_Pirate.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] robs small caravans passing by while staying in the shadows.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Pawn.title: Pawn
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Pawn.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a simple performer, a pawn in the hands of a skilled manipulator.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Manipulator.title: Manipulator
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Manipulator.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] An unprincipled person who sets {PAWN_gender ? his : her} own goals at the head.
